name: EmbeddedObjectScalingOptions
summary: The options for controlling the scaling of the objects in the drawing.

enum_values.name: ScaleX
enum_values.summary: Scales the object in the X direction.

enum_values.name: ScaleXY
enum_values.summary: Scales the object in the X and Y directions.

enum_values.name: ScaleToFit
enum_values.summary: Scales the object to fit in the frame in the Y direction.

enum_values.name: ScaleBestFit
enum_values.summary: The object is scaled inside the frame, still maintaining its original aspect ratio.
